title: Staff Level Research Engineer, AI
company_focus: Global financial technology and payments platform
description:
This is Adyen

Adyen provides payments, data, and financial products in a
single solution for customers like Meta, Uber, H&M, and
Microsoft - making us the financial technology platform of
choice. At Adyen, everything we do is engineered for
ambition.

For our teams, we create an environment with opportunities
for our people to succeed, backed by the culture and support
to ensure they are enabled to truly own their careers. We
are motivated individuals who tackle unique technical
challenges at scale and solve them as a team. Together, we
deliver innovative and ethical solutions that help
businesses achieve their ambitions faster.

The Opportunity

Adyen is building a top-tier AI research engineering team to
drive our next chapter of innovation using AI across the
entire company. This is a highly technical, hands-on
leadership role focused on translating cutting-edge AI
research into robust, scalable, and production-ready
applications within the financial technology sector. As a
Staff Level Research Engineer, you'll operate with a high
degree of autonomy and responsibility, delivering strategic,
high-impact outcomes that bridge the gap between advanced AI
research and global-scale production systems. Our AI
research efforts are expanding, with ML scientists in
Amsterdam collaborating on significant projects that could
impact trillions of dollars in transactions annually.

What you’ll do:

- Drive the execution of Adyen's AI research strategy,
  focusing on the practical application of Generative AI
  (GenAI) and other AI methodologies in finance. This
  includes contributing to Adyen's efforts in key research
  areas such as AI agents for data analysis and operational
  workflows, human-in-the-loop research for Integrity Risk,
  and potentially foundational model development. For
  instance, you might contribute to initiatives like the
  Data Agent Benchmark for Multi-step Reasoning (DABstep),
  which evaluates AI agents on real-world data analysis
  tasks, including those from the financial sector.
- Bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and
  production by rapidly prototyping AI features and
  implementing research papers into robust, scalable, and
  production-ready code that delivers measurable business
  value.
- Contribute to defining the long-term vision for AI at Adyen,
  specifically how AI will interact with humans and finance,
  including consumers, merchants, and financial
  institutions. This also includes understanding regulation
  and advocating for safe innovation in the field.
- Drive innovation by challenging the status quo, introducing
  transformative ideas, and leveraging technologies and
  methodologies to improve solutions that align with company
  strategy.
- Carry out flexible, value-driven assignments, proactively
  unblocking teams, moving between teams or scopes as needed
  to maximize organizational impact and drive strategic
  initiatives.
- Provide technical mentorship and sponsorship to engineers
  across the organization, fostering collaboration to share
  knowledge and best practices, and cultivating a culture of
  continuous improvement through deep engagement in problem-
  solving and hands-on guidance.
- Connect with the broader AI community (including startups,
  VCs, and AI labs) to stay informed of the latest
  advancements and identify potential partnership
  opportunities.
- Champion engineering and scientific alignment, advocate for
  high-quality standards, and drive the reduction of
  complexity and dependencies across teams.
- Actively pair with engineers to solve deep-rooted technical
  challenges and be fully capable of being hands-on with the
  code, whether creating proof-of-concepts or fixing
  critical performance issues.

Who you are:

- You have 10+ years of professional experience in software
  engineering, machine learning, or applied research, with a
  proven ability to drive high-impact initiatives end-to-
  end.
- You are deeply plugged into the scientific AI research
  community and have a strong understanding of the latest
  advancements in AI, especially Generative AI (GenAI) and
  Large Language Models (LLMs).
- You possess a proven ability to take cutting-edge AI
  research papers and implement them into production-
  quality, scalable code.
- You demonstrate a strong engineering mindset with a track
  record of writing clean, efficient, and scalable code
  suitable for production environments.
- You excel at translating complex technical concepts into
  clear, understandable terms for diverse audiences,
  including engineers, executives, and during public events.
  You adapt your communication style to effectively engage
  with diverse audiences.
- You demonstrate the ability to think critically and deliver
  simple and elegant solutions to complex, cross-team
  problems, influencing strategic direction and fostering
  innovation across the organization.
- You excel in soft skills such as empathy, influence,
  negotiation, relationship building, and conflict
  resolution.

Nice to haves:

- Experience in AI-enabled fintech or infrastructure
  companies.
- Familiarity with classical machine learning or
  infrastructure concepts.
- Experience with external visibility activities such as
  conferences and publications.
- A strong product sense and the ability to identify impactful
  AI use cases.
- Experience working with on-premise infrastructure.

Our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion commitments

Our unique approach is a product of our diverse
perspectives. This diversity of backgrounds and cultures is
essential in helping us maintain our momentum. Our business
and technical challenges are unique, and we need as many
different voices as possible to join us in solving them -
voices like yours. No matter who you are or where you’re
from, we welcome you to be your true self at Adyen.

Studies show that women and members of underrepresented
communities apply for jobs only if they meet 100% of the
qualifications. Does this sound like you? If so, Adyen
encourages you to reconsider and apply. We look forward to
your application!

What’s next?

Ensuring a smooth and enjoyable candidate experience is
critical for us. We aim to get back to you regarding your
application within 5 business days. Our interview process
tends to take about 4 weeks to complete, but may fluctuate
depending on the role. Learn more about our hiring process
here. Don’t be afraid to let us know if you need more
flexibility.

This role is based out of our Amsterdam office. We are an
office-first company and value in-person collaboration; we
do not offer remote-only roles.
responsibilities: Drive the execution of AI research strategy focusing on Generative AI and AI agents for data analysis, operational workflows, and Integrity Risk
Bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and production by prototyping AI features and implementing research papers into scalable code
Contribute to defining the long-term vision for AI at Adyen, focusing on AI-human interactions in finance including consumers, merchants, and financial institutions
Drive innovation by challenging the status quo, introducing transformative ideas, and leveraging technologies to improve solutions aligned with company strategy
Provide technical mentorship and sponsorship to engineers across the organization, fostering collaboration and cultivating a culture of continuous improvement
Connect with the broader AI community including startups, VCs, and AI labs to stay informed of advancements and identify partnership opportunities
use_cases: AI agents for data analysis and operational workflows in financial services
Human-in-the-loop research for Integrity Risk management in payments
Foundational model development for financial technology applications
Multi-step reasoning for financial data analysis tasks
AI-powered solutions for consumers, merchants, and financial institutions
Safe and regulated AI innovation in fintech sector
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role focuses directly on building and implementing AI
systems, specifically Generative AI, AI agents, and
foundational models. The candidate will translate research
papers into production-ready code, rapidly prototype AI
features, and work hands-on with code - all indicating
direct work on AI systems rather than just supporting
infrastructure.
